summary: Tested Sale Labels bug fix on Collection Detail Page. All features working correctly - Sale/Clearance labels now trigger sale UI elements (ribbon badge, WAS/NOW pricing, red price color) even without explicit sale_active or was_price fields.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily added 'Sale' label to alabaster-60x60cm-polished and 'Clearance' label to alabaster-30x60cm-polished for testing. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sale labels feature is fully working. Products with 'Sale', 'Clearance', or 'On Sale' labels now show: 1) Sale ribbon badge on product image, 2) SALE PRICE Ribbon with WAS/NOW pricing when tier discount is active, 3) Red price color, 4) WAS price strikethrough. Non-sale products correctly show only volume discount badges (green) without sale UI elements.

backend_apis: ✓ GET /api/tiles/collection/{series_name} returns labels field for products
✓ GET /api/tiles/products/{slug}/tier-pricing returns tier pricing with discount fields
✓ Products with Sale label have correct pricing fields
✓ Products without labels return empty labels array
✓ Clearance label recognized in API response
frontend_ui: ✓ Sale ribbon badge appears on product image when product has 'Sale' label
✓ Sale ribbon badge appears when product has 'Clearance' label
✓ SALE PRICE Ribbon shows WAS/NOW pricing when tier discount is active for sale items
✓ Price displays in red when product is on sale
✓ WAS price strikethrough shows below current price when tier discount is active
✓ Non-sale products do NOT show sale ribbon or WAS pricing
✓ 'Save X%' badge appears next to price when tier discount is active for sale items
✓ Mobile view correctly shows sale elements (red price, WAS strikethrough)
✓ Products without labels show normal pricing without sale elements

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Collection detail page did not show SALE ribbon or WAS/NOW pricing for products with Sale/Clearance labels because it only checked sale_active flag and was_price
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated isOnSale to check labels array for 'Sale'/'Clearance'/'On Sale' values in addition to sale_active && was_price
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: PASSED - All sale label scenarios working correctly
